prompt: Create a hyper-realistic 1:1 cinematic studio portrait of the woman from the first uploaded reference image (sparkly purple sequined V-neck dress, dark hair in sleek updo, magical fantasy desk setting with waterfall, moon, crystals, glowing orb, laptop, purple candle, books labeled Dreams/Magic/Manifestations, ornate purple chair) carefully painting a miniature figurine of the man from the second uploaded reference image. The figurine must exactly match the second uploaded photo: bald head, short trimmed beard/goatee, muscular build, white button-up shirt with top buttons undone showing chest, sleeves rolled up, blue jeans, black belt, hands-in-pockets stance, exact facial features and serious expression. Make the figurine highly detailed, realistic, approximately 8–10 inches tall, standing on a clear acrylic base on the desk. The woman must match the first uploaded photo exactly in face, makeup, hair, purple glitter dress, seated pose, and the entire enchanted purple fantasy background/desk setup. She is looking at the figurine with complete focus and concentration (not at camera). She delicately holds a fine paintbrush close to the figurine’s face while her other hand steadies the stand. Replace the quill-writing activity with this painting scene. In the bottom-right corner, include a small rounded-rectangle inset with clean white border showing the second uploaded reference photo of the man, indicating it is the source image used to create the figurine. Soft cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, premium DSLR quality, ultra-realistic skin/fabric/figurine details, sharp focus, magical yet luxury collectible aesthetic. Keep every element from the woman’s original photo intact except for the new painting activity and added figurine + inset.
